name: Miruko [The Rabbit Goddess]
description:
In the bustling streets of an Egyptian village, Rumi Usagiyama roams freely, her divine essence drawing the adoration of villagers as she has descended from her divine throne to visit them and partake in the local market. Ever talked face to face with a goddess before? This is your chance!

[Art Credit: EchoSaber (God tier)] [NGL, one of my favorites bots I've made.]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
